title: Revisiting single cell analysis in forensic science.
author: Watkins DRL Myers D Xavier HE Marciano MA
content: S-EPMC8007698 PMC8007698 Revisiting single cell analysis in forensic science. Forensic science has yet to take full advantage of single cell analysis. Its greatest benefit is the ability to alleviate the challenges associated with DNA mixture analysis, which remains a significant hurdle in forensic
